title: Ballooning
description: Anything you can lead can become a balloon with a Magical Lead found in Vaults!
body:
[![Made for ModFest: Carnival](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModFest/art/v2/badge/svg/carnival/cozy.svg)](https://modfest.net/carnival)


Use a _Magical Lead_ found in Minecraft's new Trial Chamber Vaults to turn anything you can put a lead on into a balloon. Make balloon animals out of pigs! Have your boats travel by air!

![Multiple dyed sheep floating in the air attached by Magical Leads](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/J1BCbrXI/images/5300a15920113b66446cbab907976ca1c320d458.png)
